overview: A browser-based AI background remover app styled to match the ClearCut brand. Users upload an image, watch real-time processing progress with time estimates and a cancel option, then get a polished background editor with preset colors, custom RGB, preset/custom images, and AI generation. After each conversion a review popup appears; submitted reviews and star analytics are shown publicly on the homepage.
features: Client-side AI background removal with estimated time and cancel button
Custom RGB color selector fix in background editor
Review section below the tool with all user reviews
Review analytics card showing average rating and star distribution
Change Background panel with tabs: preset colors, custom RGB, preset images, upload, AI generator
